mapper.select: SELECT CC.CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, CC.CATEGORY_CODE AS categoryCode, CC.CATEGORY_NAME AS categoryName, CC.DESCRIPTION AS description, CC.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder FROM CHATBOT_CATEGORY CC WHERE CC.ENABLED = 'Y' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM CHATBOT_FAQ_SETTING CFS INNER JOIN BOARD B ON CFS.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID AND CFS.ENABLED = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'FAQ' ) ORDER BY CC.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, CC.CATEGORY_ID ASC

SELECT B.BOARD_ID AS boardId, CFS.CATEGORY_ID AS categoryId, B.TITLE AS title, B.CONTENT AS content, CFS.DISPLAY_ORDER AS displayOrder FROM CHATBOT_FAQ_SETTING CFS INNER JOIN CHATBOT_CATEGORY CC ON CFS.CATEGORY_ID = CC.CATEGORY_ID INNER JOIN BOARD B ON CFS.BOARD_ID = B.BOARD_ID WHERE CFS.CATEGORY_ID = #{categoryId} AND CC.ENABLED = 'Y' AND CFS.ENABLED = 'Y' AND B.BOARD_TYPE = 'FAQ' ORDER BY CFS.DISPLAY_ORDER ASC, B.BOARD_ID ASC
